Caroline.Crops: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Hi there, {{playerName}}!"/speak {{villager}} "Hope I didn't catch you at a bad time."/speak {{villager}} "I saw you were looking for a fresh {{item}}, and wouldn't you know - a ripe one popped up in my garden just this morning!"/speak {{villager}} "$h I took that as a sign it was meant for you, {{playerName}}."/pause 250/playSound give_gift/addItem (O){{itemId}} 1/pause 500/pause 500/emote farmer 20/pause 1000/speak {{villager}} "I'm sure it's nothing like what you could grow out here, but it comes with love all the same."/speak {{villager}} "$h Have a good day, {{playerName}}! And enjoy your {{item}}!"/end
Caroline.Flower: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Hello, {{playerName}}!"/faceDirection {{villager}} 3/speak {{villager}} "I always love coming out to visit {{farmName}}. You've done such a good job with the place."/faceDirection {{villager}} 0/speak {{villager}} "By the way, someone told me you were looking for a {{item}}."/speak {{villager}} "$h I have some growing in my garden, and I'm happy to share."/pause 250/playSound give_gift/addItem (O){{itemId}} 1/pause 500/pause 500/emote farmer 20/pause 1000/speak {{villager}} "I'm surprised you don't have more flower fields out here, {{playerName}}."/speak {{villager}} "$h Although I suppose you do need the space for crops."/faceDirection {{villager}} 1/speak {{villager}} "Well, I'd better get home. If I leave Abby alone in the kitchen too long, she makes a mess of things."/speak {{villager}} "$h Take care, {{playerName}}!"/end

Pierre.Crops: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Hello {{playerName}}! Fine day, isn't it?"/speak {{villager}} "A little birdie told me you were need of a {{item}}."/speak {{villager}} "$h As you know, Pierre's has the finest produce available anywhere - and I picked this one out, just for you!"speak {{villager}} "I'm more than happy to part with it, {{playerName}}. Pierre.Forage: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Hello {{playerName}}! You're looking well this morning."/speak {{villager}} "So I saw you posted an ad for {{item}}."/speak {{villager}} "$h As you know, Pierre's always has a fine selection of foraged goods in stock, including {{item}}!"/speak {{villager}} "This one right here can be yours, if you're willing to spare a little extra for the delivery costs."/pause 250/playSound give_gift/addItem (O){{itemId}} 1/pause 500/pause 500/emote farmer 20/pause 1000/speak {{villager}} "$h Wonderful! Abigail.Gems: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Hey {{playerName}}! Abigail.Minerals: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Hey there, {{playerName}}!"/faceDirection {{villager}} 3/speak {{villager}} "Man, this place looks so much different now that you've cleared it all out."/speak {{villager}} "$s I kinda miss being able to roam the open fields in the darkness..."/faceDirection {{villager}} 0/speak {{villager}} "Uh, anyway - someone told me you were looking for {{item}}!"/speak {{villager}} "$h Got a hankering for a crunchy snack, I see."/pause 250/playSound give_gift/addItem (O){{itemId}} 1/pause 500/pause 500/emote farmer 20/pause 1000/speak {{villager}} "Seriously though. Don't chomp on that unless you wanna break your teeth."/changePortrait Abigail Abigail_thinking/faceDirection {{villager}} 1/speak {{villager}} "Y'know, I remember there was this one time, when I was in high school... I chipped a tooth on some Quartz."/speak {{villager}} "The next morning though, my smile was completely whole again. It was so weird."/changePortrait Abigail Abigail/speak {{villager}} "$s Kinda like magic or something..."/faceDirection {{villager}} 0/speak {{villager}} "$h *Snort* Sorry, I don't even know what I'm going on about."/speak {{villager}} "Anyway, enjoy your {{item}}, {{playerName}}! See you around!"/end

Evelyn.Flowers: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Well hello, Dear!"/faceDirection {{villager}} 3/speak {{villager}} "It's always a treat to come out and see what you're up to here."/faceDirection {{villager}} 0/speak {{villager}} "Your Grandfather would be very proud to see {{farmName}} Farm as it is today, {{playerName}}."/speak {{villager}} "$h Oh, by the way, I come with a delivery for you! Here."/pause 250/playSound give_gift/addItem (O){{itemId}} 1/pause 500/pause 500/emote farmer 20/pause 1000/speak {{villager}} "Alex mentioned seeing your advertisement at the board outside Pierre's."/speak {{villager}} "$h Good thing he spotted it, because I don't know if my eyes could make heads or tails of it these days!"/speak {{villager}} "$s I really do need to find those reading glasses of mine..."/speak {{villager}} "Anyway, I hope you enjoy the {{item}}, my Dear."/speak {{villager}} "$h Take care now!"/end

Gus.Crops: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Hey {{playerName}}!"/speak {{villager}} "I was at Pierre's this morning, picking up some ingredients for today's special."/speak {{villager}} "$h I spotted your {{item}} request on the way out, and wouldn't you know it, I've got a whole stock of them in the back room!"/speak {{villager}} "$s Heh, just don't tell Pierre where you got it, okay?"/pause 250/playSound give_gift/addItem (O){{itemId}} 1/pause 500/pause 500/emote farmer 20/pause 1000/speak {{villager}} "$h Always happy to help, {{playerName}}! It's what neighbors do."/speak {{villager}} "Well, I'd best get back to the Saloon. Stop by though if you want to try today's special - it's a doozy!"/speak {{villager}} "$h See you later, {{playerName}}! Don't be a stranger, you hear?"/end

Lewis.Crops: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Hello there, {{playerName}}!"/speak {{villager}} "Happy I caught you before you headed out for the day."/speak {{villager}} "I spotted the ad for {{item}} you left on the bulletin board."/speak {{villager}} "$h Isn't it nice knowing you can rely on your neighbors whenever you need a helping hand?"/speak {{villager}} "Anyway, I happen to have {{item}} growing in my garden this season, and I'm more than happy to share!"/pause 250/playSound give_gift/addItem (O){{itemId}} 1/pause 500/pause 500/emote farmer 20/pause 1000/speak {{villager}} "I do hope it's up to {{farmName}} standards."/speak {{villager}} "$h Well, I'd best be off. Important mayoral duties and all that."/speak {{villager}} "Enjoy the rest of your day, {{playerName}}!"/end
